info.english_meaning: to fall downto dropto slip offto hang down to slide to deteriorate
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 1.859 BraMsu~ ityatra 'BraMSu ityapi kecitpeWuH' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'devAH svargaM lokamAyannapAsurA aBraMSanta' (mE0 saM0 464) apABraMSanta prAcyavanta
